unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 交换；交流 & vt. 交换；交流；交易；兑换
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hi, I'm Max Jackson. I'm an exchange student from the UK.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：ex（出，向外）+ change（改变）= 交换；交流。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 讲座；讲课；教训 & vi. (开)讲座；讲课 & vt. 训斥
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hello, everyone! Welcome to our school!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：lect（选择，收集）+ ure（名词后缀）= 讲课，讲座。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My name is Amy. I'd like to have a student ID card, please.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：register（注册）+ ation（名词后缀）= 注册，登记。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Good morning. I'd like to register for a class.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：reg（规则，管理）+ ister = 登记，注册。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Amy is getting her student ID card. Listen to Conversation 1 and complete the table.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：字母s, e, x组成性别一词。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 女(性)的；雌的 & n. 雌性动(植)物；女子
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Sex: Female
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：fe（副，阴性）+ male（男性）= 女性的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 男(性)的；雄的 & n. 雄性动(植)物；女子
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A registration office scene where a female student with a shoulder bag is talking to a male staff member...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：和female对比记忆，去掉fe就是male。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Amy is getting her student ID card. Listen to Conversation 1 and complete the table.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：nation（国家）+ al（形容词后缀）+ ity（名词后缀）= 国籍。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We come from different nations.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：nat（生，诞生）+ ion = 国家，民族。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Ms Li, I want to be a designer in the future...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：design（设计）+ er（人）= 设计者。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 设计；设计方案 & vt. 设计；筹划
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They will help you understand design better.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：de（下）+ sign（记号，画）= 绘下图纸，即设计。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: An exchange student is talking to a teacher on campus.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：camp（营地）+ us（我们）= 校园。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: People speak in a more polite way in formal situations.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：form（形式）+ al（形容词后缀）= 正式的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: So this is it—senior high school at last! I'm not outgoing so I'm a little anxious right now.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：anx（拧，绞）+ ious -> 心绞在一起，即焦虑的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How did you feel on your first day of senior high school? Circle the pictures that describe how you felt: happy, anxious, excited, annoyed, frightened.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：annoy（使恼怒）+ ed（形容词后缀）= 恼怒的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A little child pulls at his ear and annoys him.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：an（加强）+ noy（伤害，恼怒）= 使恼怒。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I didn't feel awkward or frightened at all.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：fright（害怕）+ en + ed = 惊吓的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: 12:30 p.m. I just had my first maths class at senior high school!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 缩写记忆：p.m. 代表下午，源自拉丁语 post meridiem。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: 7:00 a.m. So this is it—senior high school at last!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 缩写记忆：a.m. 代表上午，源自拉丁语 ante meridiem。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 级别(或地位)高的 & n. 较年长的人
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: learn about first-year senior high school students in different countries.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：sen（老，年长）+ ior = 级别高的，年长的。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: senior high school vs junior high school
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: 1. read about a student's first day of school.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：senior（高级的）+ high school（中学）= 高中。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: So this is it—senior high school at last!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：at（在）+ last（最后）= 终于，最终。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm not outgoing so I'm a little anxious right now.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合词：out（向外）+ going（走去的）= 爱交际的，外向的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I want to make a good first impression.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：impress（印）+ ion（名词后缀）= 印象。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. 使钦佩；给……留下深刻的好印象 & vi. 留下印象
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I want to impress my teachers.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：im（在……内）+ press（压）= 印在脑海中，即留下深刻印象。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: make an impression vs make a decision
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I want to make a good first impression.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：make（做出）+ an impression（印象）= 留下印象。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What if no one talks to me?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：what（什么）+ if（如果）= 如果……会怎么样？

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The guy next to me tried to talk to me the whole time.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：guy 指小伙子、家伙。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vi. & vt. 集中(注意力)；聚精会神
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: if she concentrated on the ideas, not the single words, she could understand!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：con（共同）+ centr（中心）+ ate（动词后缀）= 集中到中心，即专注。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I couldn't concentrate on the experiment.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：concentrate（集中）+ on（在……上）= 集中精力于。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I couldn't concentrate on the experiment.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：ex（出）+ peri（尝试）+ ment（名词后缀）= 实验。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I really wanted to tell him to please be quiet and leave me alone!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：leave（留下）+ alone（独自一人）= 别打扰我。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 令人尴尬的；难对付的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I didn't feel awkward or frightened at all.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：awk（扭曲，怪异）+ ward（朝向）= 扭曲尴尬的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 地位(或职位、级别)低下的 & n. 职位较低者
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I miss my friends from junior high school...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：jun（年轻）+ ior = 级别低的，年少的。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: junior high school vs senior high school
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I miss my friends from junior high school, but I believe I will make new friends here...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：junior（初级的）+ high school（中学）= 初中。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: there's a lot to explore at senior high.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：ex（出）+ plore（喊叫，寻找）= 探索。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I feel much more confident than I felt this morning.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：con（共同）+ fid（相信）+ ent = 自信的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I have confidence in you.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：con（共同）+ fid（相信）+ ence（名词后缀）= 信心。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adv. 向前；前进 & adj. 向前的；前进的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Tom is looking forward to meeting the new exchange student.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：for（前）+ ward（朝向）= 向前的。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: look forward to vs look down on
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Tom is looking forward to meeting the new exchange student.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：look（看）+ forward（向前）+ to（向）= 盼望，期待。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I just listen to the teacher and take notes.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：take（记下）+ notes（笔记）= 记笔记。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 光；信号 & vi. 闪耀 & vt. 使闪耀
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I like using flash cards.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：flash 闪光，闪现。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They are really effective. Flash cards help me remember.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：flash（闪现）+ card（卡片）= 教学闪卡。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. 组织；筹备；安排；组建 & vi. 组建
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: so I make mind maps to organise my thoughts.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：organ（器官，机构）+ ise（动词后缀）= 组织，组建。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Study the organisation and language features.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：organise（组织）+ ation（名词后缀）= 组织，机构。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How you like to learn depends on what kind of person you are. Decide on your goal before you make a plan.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：足球破门（goal）就是我们的最终目标（goal）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Li Ming and Amy are talking about learning strategies.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：strat（层，结构）+ egy = 针对全局的策略。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Fill in the table with the words and phrases from the text, and tell a partner about Han Jing's day.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：part（部分，分担）+ ner（人）= 共同分担的人，即同伴。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What is the best way for you to improve your reading skills?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：im（在……内）+ prove（证明，验证）-> 不断优化证明，即改进。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 好奇的；求知欲强的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm curious about everything.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：cur（关心，注意）+ ious = 好奇的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My dream is to start my own IT company!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：com（共同）+ pan（面包，生计）+ y = 一起吃面包生存的团体，即公司。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Circle the phrases that Ann and Thando use to describe their personalities...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：person（人）+ al（形容词后缀）+ ity（名词后缀）= 个性，性格。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Reflect on your learning styles and strategies.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：style代表风格，方式。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. & vi. 修改；修订；复习
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Get your draft back and revise it.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：re（再，重新）+ vis（看）= 重新审看，即修改，修订。
